creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to andrkaz from comment #0)

Hi andrkaz,

Thanks for your feedback, can you provide more information about the
way you compile C-icap ? I mean OS version, tools you use, etc

The port was tested in poudriere before commit, but if I miss
something, is my duty to fix it as soon as possible.

Best regards,
- rodrigo
